title: test_admin_authentication_with_valid_and_invalid_credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/trpc/loginAdmin authenticates users correctly by returning a JWT token, role, and partnerId for valid credentials and returns a 401 Unauthorized error for invalid credentials without issuing a token.

title: test_get_campaign_details_for_existing_and_missing_campaigns
description: Verify that GET /api/trpc/getCampaignDetails returns 200 with campaign details for an existing active campaign and returns 404 Campaign not found for a missing or expired campaign.

title: test_capture_lead_with_valid_and_duplicate_data
description: Verify that POST /api/trpc/captureLead registers a new lead and returns player profile and spin tokens for valid data, and returns validation or conflict errors when duplicate userId and campaignId combinations or invalid data are submitted.

title: test_spin_roulette_with_rate_limiting_and_stock_control
description: Verify that POST /api/trpc/spinRoulette executes a prize spin correctly with token validation, atomic stock decrement, and returns prize details; rejects rapid repeated requests with 429 rate limit; returns 403 when no unused tokens are available; and assigns fallback prize when stock is depleted.

title: test_get_user_prizes_by_email_with_valid_and_invalid_signature
description: Verify that GET /api/trpc/getUserPrizesByEmail returns an array of won prizes when provided a valid HMAC signature and returns 401 Signature verification failed when the signature is invalid, ensuring secure prize retrieval.
